geometry_summary.background_field: zero (transport-current-only variant per upstream B1 statement)

license_evidence.verdict: no explicit license declared on the benchmark-1 page, the model-files index, or the workgroup landing; only a bare copyright footer is present. No Apache / MIT / CC-BY / GPL / public-domain statement. No 'all rights reserved' or restrictive language either. Status = license-unclear (= unsafe to redistribute under demiurge g3).
license_evidence.decision: SKIP — provenance manifest only; no .pro / .geo / .dat / .msh vendored to ~/local/hts_workgroup_cache/ or to the repo. Matches D1 cohort honest stance (RTSC.md §4.2 Axis E).

comparable_cube_benchmark.note: Cube benchmark (life-hts/cube/cube.pro on GetDP 4.0.0 ARM native) ran full-cycle in 10.3 min on macOS Apple Silicon. benchmark1_tape was anticipated to be similar magnitude or smaller (2-D cartesian vs 3-D cube) but is NOT executed here — license-block forbids vendoring upstream .pro content.

getdp_environment.note: GetDP 4.0.0 ARM native is installed and operational (per RTSC.md §4.2.1.c/d cube run). Skip is purely license-driven, not toolchain-driven.

scope_caveats: (s1) Linear magnetostatic baseline NOT replaced by HTS-grade H-formulation in this record — provenance-only.
(s2) 2-D Cartesian benchmark — leads / support / 3-D return path not modelled even if it ran.
(s4) External-benchmark geometry, not an absorbed RTSC design; absorbed=false enforced.
(s6) References HTS Modelling Workgroup benchmark; ≠ measured REBCO tape Jc(B,T,θ).
(license) htsmodelling.com hosts the benchmark statement under a bare copyright footer with no permissive license. Default copyright law applies: redistribution unsafe. SKIP per demiurge g3.
re_enable_hint: If htsmodelling.com later publishes an explicit permissive license (CC-BY / Apache / MIT / public-domain), flip benchmark1_tape/README.md status, vendor the .pro / .geo into ~/local/hts_workgroup_cache/benchmark1_tape/ (gitignored cache), and rerun via h_formulation_adapter.py. The user MAY personally accept the redistribution risk with DEMIURGE_RTSC_USE_LICENSE_UNCLEAR=1; this record honors the default-OFF stance.
